creator: alias@karstens.us
text:
I've tried from two different email servers to reply to the feedback request for problem kern/99036 : [ath] Long association time for 11b access points with atheros chipset on 6.1 kernel. As I was not able to submit via email, I'm doing another bug report so that you can get the information you need.

Is there another way to submit feedback that doesn't involve email?

The email apparently sits in queue for a couple of days, and then says something like:

Hi. This is the qmail-send program at u15175524.onlinehome-server.com.
I'm afraid I wasn't able to deliver your message to the following addresses.
This is a permanent error; I've given up. Sorry it didn't work out.

<bug-followup@FreeBSD.org>:
216.136.204.125 does not like recipient.
Remote host said: 450 Client host rejected: cannot find your hostname, [82.165.226.88]
Giving up on 216.136.204.125.
I'm not going to try again; this message has been in the queue too long.

<sam@FreeBSD.org>:
216.136.204.125 does not like recipient.
Remote host said: 450 Client host rejected: cannot find your hostname, [82.165.226.88]
Giving up on 216.136.204.125.
I'm not going to try again; this message has been in the queue too long.
